scan_output: Vulnerability file_permissions_backup_etc_gshadow not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message:
The backup shadow file **/etc/gshadow-** has been secured by removing all permissions, as required by the OpenSCAP rule `file_permissions_backup_etc_gshadow`. The remediation steps performed were:

1. Verified the file exists using `read_file`.
2. Applied the permission change with `chmod u-xwrs,g-xwrs,o-xwrt /etc/gshadow-` (equivalent to mode `0000`).

The verification scan will now confirm that the file permissions meet the compliance requirement.
